product_finish_contract.placeholder_policy: No placeholder art. All sprites from free/open sources.
product_finish_contract.visual_finish_target: 2D top-down with sourced sprite sheets. Polished look.
product_finish_contract.audio_finish_target: SFX from Freesound.org (CC0). Background music optional.
product_finish_contract.content_source_plan: Kenney.nl, OpenGameArt.org, Freesound.org. All CC0 or CC-BY.
product_finish_contract.licensing_or_provenance_constraints: Full provenance in assets/PROVENANCE.md. Credits scene for CC-BY.
product_finish_contract.finish_acceptance_signals: APK compiles. All waves playable. All assets tracked. Credits scene works.

repair_history.summary: Managed Scafforge repair runner refreshed deterministic workflow surfaces and evaluated downstream repair obligations.
blocking_reasons: project-skill-bootstrap must still run: Repo-local skills still contain generic placeholder/model drift that must be regenerated with project-specific content.
ticket-pack-builder must still run: Repair left remediation or reverification follow-up that must be routed into the repo ticket system.
Post-repair verification failed repair-contract consistency checks: placeholder_local_skills_survived_refresh.

migration_stage.summary: Repo already uses the current process contract.
